creator: steinab@ifi.uio.no
text:
gkrellm2 segfaults on startup after the big gettext update.

Apr  7 08:53:38 pallotta kernel: pid 1239 (gkrellm), uid 1001: exited on signal 11


The symptoms have been described in detail on questions@:

http://docs.FreeBSD.org/cgi/mid.cgi?e572718c0703200421s70d7c91au8cba168984bd191e
